UserStory: As a user I want to log in with my phone so I can access my account
ExpectedBehaviour: Enter phone (>=9 digits enables Log In); tap calls signInWithPhone -> Supabase OTP; navigates to auth/verify; error shows alert
KnownConcerns: none obvious

UserStory: As a user I want to enter the OTP so I can verify my number
ExpectedBehaviour: 6-cell grid, auto-advance, auto-submit on 6th digit -> verifyOtp; wrong code clears+refocus; success -> (tabs)
KnownConcerns: none

UserStory: As a user I want to resend the code if not received
ExpectedBehaviour: 60s countdown then Resend link resets timer
KnownConcerns: BUG: Resend resets UI timer but does NOT re-call signInWithPhone (no code actually resent)

UserStory: As a user I want to fix a wrong number
ExpectedBehaviour: router.back to auth/phone
KnownConcerns: none

UserStory: As a new user I want to sign up with phone+email
ExpectedBehaviour: Phone>=9 enables Continue; OTP sent; navigates register/verify
KnownConcerns: BUG: email has no validation (empty/malformed allowed)

UserStory: As a new user I want to verify my phone
ExpectedBehaviour: Same OTP grid; auto-submit on 6th digit AND Verify button now wired (submitOtp) with loading guard; success -> register/profile
KnownConcerns: FIXED: Verify button was a dead no-op (onPress empty); now triggers verification

UserStory: As a new user I want to enter my name/gender/city/referral
ExpectedBehaviour: First+last required to enable Continue; gender/city/referral optional
KnownConcerns: Gender is a free TextInput though labelled 'Select gender' (no picker)

UserStory: As a new user I want to confirm details before saving
ExpectedBehaviour: Shows email/phone/city; Confirm upserts contributor_profiles; on DB error shows alert + stays (no longer advances on failed save); -> register/pin
KnownConcerns: FIXED: save error was swallowed (advanced to PIN even if write failed); now throws->Alert->return. Terms/Privacy wired

UserStory: As a new user I want to set a 4-digit PIN
ExpectedBehaviour: create->confirm; mismatch resets; stores PIN in AsyncStorage; -> register/survey
KnownConcerns: Registration PIN stored in AsyncStorage (plain) vs wallet PIN in SecureStore — inconsistent/!secure

UserStory: As a new user I want to say how I found Troski
ExpectedBehaviour: Radio options update referral_source; Go to Home -> completeOnboarding -> (tabs); submitting guard + disabled button prevents double completeOnboarding
KnownConcerns: FIXED: added double-submit guard + loading state. referral_source write still best-effort (low value)

UserStory: As a commuter I want a personal greeting and my location
ExpectedBehaviour: Shows Hello,{name} (i18n) + reverse-geocoded location via Mapbox
KnownConcerns: none

UserStory: As a commuter I want to see my balance with a premium card
ExpectedBehaviour: Fetches /api/wallet/balance on focus; stacked violet+teal deck behind; eye toggles blur
KnownConcerns: none (balance 0 until backend)

UserStory: As a commuter I want to top up
ExpectedBehaviour: -> /wallet/fund (or /auth/phone if not auth)
KnownConcerns: none

UserStory: As a commuter I want to scan to pay
ExpectedBehaviour: -> /scan
KnownConcerns: none

UserStory: As a commuter I want to plan a trip
ExpectedBehaviour: -> /routes/search
KnownConcerns: none

UserStory: As a commuter I want nearby terminals
ExpectedBehaviour: -> /terminals
KnownConcerns: none

UserStory: As a commuter I want queue status
ExpectedBehaviour: -> /queue/status
KnownConcerns: none

UserStory: As a commuter I want to pick a transport service
ExpectedBehaviour: Bus->routes/search, Train->lines; Okada/Pragya/Courier -> coming soon alert
KnownConcerns: none

UserStory: As a commuter I want to see/hide balance
ExpectedBehaviour: Seeds balance+tx from walletCache on mount (instant paint); hydrated guard shows skeleton not empty-state until first fetch; eye toggles blur
KnownConcerns: FIXED: blank-flash on open eliminated; cache only written on confirmed balance (no clobber on partial response)

UserStory: As a commuter I want confirmation when a top-up lands
ExpectedBehaviour: Compares balance across refetch; green banner +GHC X for 5s
KnownConcerns: Only fires on refetch; no push if user stays on screen (webhook push exists separately)

UserStory: As a commuter I want to see my active ticket
ExpectedBehaviour: Shows soonest active pass (route, expiry, code, fare, plate); tap -> /wallet/ticket

UserStory: As a commuter I want to cancel an unused ticket for a refund
ExpectedBehaviour: Confirm alert -> cancelBooking -> /api/bookings/cancel -> refund to wallet -> refetch
KnownConcerns: No double-tap guard during async cancel

UserStory: As a commuter I want my full ticket history
ExpectedBehaviour: 'My Tickets' row -> /wallet/tickets
KnownConcerns: none

UserStory: As a commuter I want recent activity
ExpectedBehaviour: Shows 5 newest; credit green +, debit -, refund green; SEE ALL -> /wallet/transactions

UserStory: As a commuter I want active/used/expired/cancelled tickets

UserStory: As a commuter I want full transaction history
ExpectedBehaviour: /api/wallet/transactions limit/offset; grouped by day; loads more near bottom

UserStory: As a commuter I want full tx detail + reference
ExpectedBehaviour: Status badge, amount, date, balance-after, copyable reference

UserStory: As a commuter I want my QR to work with no signal
ExpectedBehaviour: Renders QR from local cache (no network); brightness boost (needs rebuild)

UserStory: As a commuter I want to pick a top-up method

UserStory: As a commuter I want to top up via MoMo
ExpectedBehaviour: Amount(5/10/20/50/custom)+phone+provider -> POST /api/wallet/topup -> 'approve on phone'; credited via webhook; phone validated against Ghana mobile format
KnownConcerns: FIXED: phone now format-validated (^0?[25]\\d{8}$) instead of bare length>=9. No max amount client check (backend bounds)

UserStory: As a commuter I want bank transfer info
ExpectedBehaviour: Pick bank -> show account + Copy

UserStory: As a commuter I want a PIN before spending
ExpectedBehaviour: First payment creates PIN (SecureStore), later verifies; 5-attempt lock; biometric option
KnownConcerns: Biometric needs native rebuild (lazy, falls back to PIN)

UserStory: As a passenger I want to review route+fare before paying
ExpectedBehaviour: Shows route/fare(real from route_id)/driver; real wallet balance; Pay disabled ('Checking balance…') until balance resolves; insufficient -> Top up CTA
KnownConcerns: FIXED: Pay no longer enabled while balance unknown (overdraw path closed). Driver card still MOCK (no driver pool)

UserStory: As a passenger I want to pay securely
ExpectedBehaviour: PIN gate -> createBooking -> /api/bookings/create -> debit + ticket; guards double-submit
KnownConcerns: none (verified earlier)

UserStory: As a passenger I want feedback while booking
ExpectedBehaviour: 2.3s coin-drop animation -> receipt with ticket params
KnownConcerns: 2.3s is fixed (not tied to real API)

UserStory: As a passenger I want my ticket
ExpectedBehaviour: Shows real trip_code/route/fare, QR, Copy ref, Share; tapping QR -> arrived (demo)

UserStory: As a passenger I want to rate my trip
ExpectedBehaviour: Stats + 5-star + tags; Done -> submitRideRating (fire-forget) -> dismissAll; GO hides driver card

UserStory: As a commuter I want to scan a bus QR to pay
ExpectedBehaviour: Camera frame is PLACEHOLDER; manual 'Input Bus Code' path works (>=3 chars)

UserStory: As a commuter I want to confirm bus before paying
ExpectedBehaviour: Shows bus details + payment method -> /scan/pin

UserStory: As a commuter I want to authorise scan payment
ExpectedBehaviour: 6-box keypad -> any 6 digits succeeds -> processing -> receipt
KnownConcerns: CRITICAL: scan flow never calls createBooking (no debit, no real ticket); PIN not validated

UserStory: As a passenger I want live trip tracking
ExpectedBehaviour: Pick alight/stations -> Start -> GPS permission -> live map+sheet

UserStory: As a passenger I want to see my position + progress
ExpectedBehaviour: Mapbox route corridor, vehicle marker, station dots, progress, speed; >50km uses simulation

UserStory: As a passenger I want an alert near my stop
ExpectedBehaviour: Approaching banner ~300m trotro/500m train + local notification

UserStory: As a passenger I want to report fare and earn points
ExpectedBehaviour: Modal fare input -> updateTripFare + awardPointsForTrip (5 base +3 fare)

UserStory: As a rider I want to switch Trotro Routes / Train
ExpectedBehaviour: Segment swaps RoutesScreen/TrainScreen

UserStory: As a rider I want to browse routes
ExpectedBehaviour: FlatList cards: route, fare, confidence, rating, GPRTU; filter type/region; search

ExpectedBehaviour: Mode pills; from/to + swap; auto-search 1.2s debounce; saved Home/Work/Current; station suggestions

UserStory: As a rider I want to pick exact point on map

UserStory: As a rider I want corridor map + live info

UserStory: As a rider I want to pick a bus + alerts
ExpectedBehaviour: Information -> bus list (ETA) -> bus timeline; bell toggles arrival alert

UserStory: As a rider I want fare history
ExpectedBehaviour: Trend tab w/ 7/30 day chart

UserStory: As a rider I want to save routes

UserStory: As a rider I want safety tools

UserStory: As a commuter I want celebration on milestone

UserStory: As a commuter I want immersive post view

UserStory: As a commuter I want official announcements
